title: Buzbug Bug Zapper Indoor 5000 Sq Ft, 20W & High-Voltage Electric Mosquito Zapper, Fly Zapper, Fruit Fly Traps Fly Killer, Includes 2-Pack Replacement Bulbs -MA015
bullet_points: Powerful Insect Control: The mosquito lamps attract mosquitoes, flies, fruit flies, moths, wasps, and other flying insects. Upgraded high-voltage grid delivers a powerful electric shock in just 0.01 seconds. (To get a better attraction effect, it is recommended to use the mosquito zapper at night or in a dark environment.)

Two Extra Lamp Tubes: The fly killer comes with two extra replacement bug zapper light bulbs included in the package. When the original lamp ages due to use, a simple replacement can allow the mosquito trap to continue to operate efficiently.

5000 sq ft Wide Coverage: This mosquito killer covers an area of up to 5,000 sq ft, making it not only ideal for use in various residential such as homes, kitchens, patio, but also for commercial fly trap for restaurants, offices, garages, and warehouses.

EPA Registered & Safety Protection: This electric bug zapper is U.S. EPA registered, ensuring compliance and reliability. This mosquito killer operates without emitting smoke or odors. Its dense protective grill shields against accidental touches, providing a safe environment for your family and pets.

Easy to Use and Clean: Just plug in the power and turn on the switch to use. There is a pull-out collection tray at the bottom for easy collection and cleaning of flying insect remains, and the equipped cleaning brush makes the maintenance of the electric fly trap indoors easier. The mosquito repellent also comes with a lanyard, which can be hung or placed on any flat surface for use.

Reliable Warranty Statement: Enjoy peace of mind with Buzbug’s round-the-clock customer support and 1-year warranty for your indoor fly zapper, ensuring reliable assistance and long-lasting insect control.
